demos/modulo1-introduccion/demo-monolito.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21.
demos/modulo1-introduccion/demo-monolito.why_exists: Compilation will target Java 17 bytecode instead of 21, failing to utilize new language features or meeting strict JDK 21 compliance requirements.

demos/modulo1-introduccion/demo-monolito.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin version to support Java 21 compilation.
demos/modulo1-introduccion/demo-monolito.why_exists: Older plugin versions may not fully support or correctly handle Java 21 language features and bytecode generation.

demos/modulo1-introduccion/demo-monolito.general_idea: Replace separate source/target configuration with the unified release flag in maven-compiler-plugin.
demos/modulo1-introduccion/demo-monolito.why_exists: Using separate source/target is deprecated in favor of the release flag which ensures consistent compilation against the target JDK's API.
